method_note: Citation support, unsupported-claim and human-review rates are calculated from the actual current run. Obligation precision and recall are calculated only when you provide an independent gold-standard obligations file for the same document. These are deterministic support metrics, not model self-scores and not legal/compliance proof.

metrics.method: Calculated only when a run-specific gold-standard obligations file is provided.
metrics.limitation: Not available without independent gold obligations for the same document. A weak gold set creates weak metrics.

metrics.method: Gold-centric matching against the run-specific gold set.
metrics.limitation: Requires independent human gold obligations. Not calculated from the model output alone.

metrics.method: Rule-based citation support check using quote integrity, token overlap, n-grams, numbers and modality/negation checks.
metrics.limitation: Textual support is not legal interpretation; human review remains required.

metrics.method: Rule-based weak support detection against the cited source chunks used in the run.
metrics.limitation: A low rate is encouraging but does not guarantee correctness.

metrics.method: Deterministic review flags from weak support, missing quotes, number mismatches and modality/negation issues.
metrics.limitation: A high rate can be positive in regulated workflows because it surfaces uncertainty instead of hiding it.
